tasks.subject: Task 0: Run UI polish audit
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Produce docs/ui-polish-audit.md — a single ranked finding catalog covering visual, structural, and functional issues across the WebUI.

**Files:**
- Create: docs/ui-polish-audit.md

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- File exists with sections: Visual / Structural / Functional / Per-page summary
- Each finding tagged P0/P1/P2 with one-line rationale
- Each finding routed to chunk 4a-4f or Page-<name>
- Layout-shift root cause explicitly identified
- Sections-with-no-settings inventory enumerated
- Committed

**Verify:** wc -l docs/ui-polish-audit.md > 100

```json:metadata
{"files": ["docs/ui-polish-audit.md"], "verifyCommand": "git log -1 docs/ui-polish-audit.md && wc -l docs/ui-polish-audit.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["file exists with required sections", "all findings tagged P0/P1/P2", "all findings routed to chunk or Page", "layout-shift root cause identified", "sections-with-no-settings inventoried"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: .page-shell wrapper foundation
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Single CSS container that every page renders inside. Layout-shift bug closed at source.

**Files:**
- Modify: glados/webui/static/style.css
- Modify: glados/webui/pages/_shell.py:91
- Modify: glados/webui/pages/*.py (every per-page module)
- Modify: glados/webui/static/ui.js (every JS render function)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- .page-shell defined with max-width, padding, grid
- Every page renders inside exactly one .page-shell
- Zero layout shift between Configuration sub-pages (DevTools verified)
- No regression in .tab-content selector

**Verify:** pytest tests/ -k webui -q && visual cycle through Configuration sub-pages

```json:metadata
{"files": ["glados/webui/static/style.css", "glados/webui/pages/_shell.py", "glados/webui/pages/chat.py", "glados/webui/pages/tts_generator.py", "glados/webui/pages/system.py", "glados/webui/pages/integrations.py", "glados/webui/pages/memory.py", "glados/webui/pages/logs.py", "glados/webui/pages/users.py", "glados/webui/static/ui.js"], "verifyCommand": "pytest tests/ -k webui -q", "acceptanceCriteria": [".page-shell defined in style.css", "every page wrapped in .page-shell", "zero layout shift between Configuration sub-pages", "webui tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Brand mark font fix
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Sidebar 'GLaDOS · CONTROL' switches from Major Mono Display to JetBrains Mono.

**Files:**
- Modify: glados/webui/static/style.css:111-123
- Modify: glados/webui/pages/_shell.py:24-28

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- .sidebar-brand uses var(--font-mono)
- letter-spacing 0.06em, font-weight 700, size 0.85rem
- Markup reads 'GLaDOS · CONTROL' with brand-sep + brand-dim spans
- Major Mono Display only on page H1 rules

**Verify:** grep -n 'var(--font-display)' glados/webui/static/style.css → only H1 rules remain

```json:metadata
{"files": ["glados/webui/static/style.css", "glados/webui/pages/_shell.py"], "verifyCommand": "grep -n 'var(--font-display)' glados/webui/static/style.css", "acceptanceCriteria": [".sidebar-brand uses --font-mono", "correct letter-spacing and weight", "markup updated with brand-sep/brand-dim", "Major Mono Display reserved for page H1"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Status dot live aggregate
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Top-left status dot reflects /health aggregate when authed, grey when unauth, hidden on /setup. Tooltip enumerates per-service health.

**Files:**
- Create: tests/test_health_aggregate.py
- Modify: glados/webui/tts_ui.py (add /api/health/aggregate)
- Modify: glados/webui/static/ui.js (updateEngineStatus)
- Modify: glados/webui/static/style.css:125-133 (add .degraded, .unauth)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- GET /api/health/aggregate returns {overall, services} structure
- Auth required for per-service detail; unauth gets {overall: 'unauth'}
- Dot CSS classes: running/degraded/stopping/unauth
- Hidden on /setup
- Polls every 30s when authed
- Tooltip lists services

**Verify:** pytest tests/test_health_aggregate.py -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/test_health_aggregate.py", "glados/webui/tts_ui.py", "glados/webui/static/ui.js", "glados/webui/static/style.css"], "verifyCommand": "pytest tests/test_health_aggregate.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["endpoint returns correct shape", "unauth returns overall:unauth only", "dot reflects worst-of state", "tooltip enumerates services", "hidden on /setup"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Account cluster rebuild
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace boxed Account block with plain sidebar-row + click-to-open dropdown (Change Password / Sessions / Sign out).

**Files:**
- Modify: glados/webui/pages/_shell.py:56-73
- Modify: glados/webui/static/style.css:180-227
- Modify: glados/webui/static/ui.js (updateAuthUI, toggleAccountMenu)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- No #sidebarAccount box wrapper; row matches .nav-item affordance
- No purple emoji icon (👤 removed)
- Click toggles .account-menu upward with 3 items
- Sign out moved into dropdown
- Outside-click closes menu
- Sign in (unauth) is single sidebar-row, not button

**Verify:** Visual verification via preview MCP

```json:metadata
{"files": ["glados/webui/pages/_shell.py", "glados/webui/static/style.css", "glados/webui/static/ui.js"], "verifyCommand": "# manual visual via preview MCP", "acceptanceCriteria": ["box wrapper removed", "emoji icon removed", "dropdown opens upward with 3 items", "sign out in dropdown", "outside-click closes", "unauth shows sidebar-row sign-in"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Login page rebuild
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace bootstrap-styled login with bare-canvas + telemetry-strip variant (operator approved B).

**Files:**
- Modify: glados/webui/tts_ui.py (LOGIN_HTML at ~line 752, add /api/health/public)
- Modify: glados/webui/static/style.css (.login-* classes)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Renders on --bg-dark canvas, no card
- Brand mark JetBrains Mono
- Telemetry strip with /health/public probe
- Inputs use --bg-input + --border-default
- Custom mono stay-signed-in checkbox
- Submit button outline orange (warning-light)
- Error block uses --red, mono caps

**Verify:** Visual match to mockup B at /login

```json:metadata
{"files": ["glados/webui/tts_ui.py", "glados/webui/static/style.css"], "verifyCommand": "pytest tests/ -k login -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["bare canvas no card", "telemetry strip on login", "design-system inputs", "outline orange button", "red mono error block"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Token sweep (mechanical, post-audit)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace --text/--text-dim with four-tier --fg-*; replace #3a3a42 borders with rgba --border-*; normalize off-grid spacing; purge drop-shadows.

**Files:**
- Modify: glados/webui/static/style.css (broad)
- Modify: glados/webui/static/ui.js (any inline styles)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- 0 var(--text\b) in rule bodies
- 0 #3a3a42 in rule bodies
- 0 box-shadow declarations except 'none'
- All numeric values use --sp-* / 0 / 100% / auto / 100vh / em
- Tests pass

**Verify:** grep -nE 'var\(--text\b' glados/webui/static/style.css; grep -nE '#3a3a42' glados/webui/static/style.css; pytest tests/ -k webui -q

```json:metadata
{"files": ["glados/webui/static/style.css", "glados/webui/static/ui.js"], "verifyCommand": "grep -nE 'var\\(--text\\b' glados/webui/static/style.css glados/webui/static/ui.js && grep -nE '#3a3a42' glados/webui/static/style.css", "acceptanceCriteria": ["--text/--text-dim swept", "#3a3a42 swept", "box-shadow purged", "spacing tokenized", "tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: TTS Generator redesign (Variant A)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Apply operator-approved Variant A: stroke icons, segmented mode pill, persona/format/attitude dropdowns removed, pronunciation overrides applied, telemetry strip.

**Files:**
- Modify: glados/webui/pages/tts_generator.py (full HTML rewrite)
- Modify: glados/webui/static/style.css (.tts-seg, .telemetry-strip, .ico-btn)
- Modify: glados/webui/static/ui.js (renderTTSFileList, ttsGenerate, _ttsSwitchMode)
- Modify: glados/api/server.py (/api/generate applies pronunciation)
- Create: tests/test_tts_generator_pronunciation.py

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- No voiceSelect/formatSelect/attitudeSelect in HTML
- Mode toggle uses .tts-seg segmented pill
- Telemetry strip with MODE/PERSONA/FORMAT/PIPER
- File rows 28-32px tall, 22px icon buttons, no permanent red
- /api/generate applies pronunciation overrides
- Visual matches mockup

**Verify:** pytest tests/test_tts_generator_pronunciation.py -v && grep -nE 'id="(voiceSelect|formatSelect|attitudeSelect)"' glados/webui/pages/tts_generator.py

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/test_tts_generator_pronunciation.py", "glados/api/server.py", "glados/webui/pages/tts_generator.py", "glados/webui/static/style.css", "glados/webui/static/ui.js"], "verifyCommand": "pytest tests/test_tts_generator_pronunciation.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["dropdowns removed", "segmented mode pill", "telemetry strip on page", "icon buttons in file rows", "pronunciation overrides applied", "matches Variant A mockup"]}
```
